instructions: At the start of every session read .platform/work/BRIEF.md and .platform/work/ACTIVE.md.
Follow the 6-stage workflow defined in .platform/workflow.md: triage, research, propose, execute, verify, log.
Before proposing any architectural change, read .platform/memory/decisions.md.
Never self-declare a stream complete — present evidence and let the developer close it.
Append one line to .platform/memory/log.md after every successful task.
